codeReview.summary: The ui-md-linter implementation is complete and functional. All three required files (schema.json, ui-md-lint.js, README.md) exist and work correctly. All sample UI.md files pass validation with zero errors. The linter validates Markdown structure, screen/state/role ID uniqueness, JSON appendix against schema, and referential integrity.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation extends SPEC.md section 11 in several ways: (1) state type enum expanded from 6 to 13 values (adds idle, scrollback, editing, search-active, streaming, refreshing, field-selected), (2) backStack enum adds 'Pop' to the SPEC's 4 values, (3) ID patterns changed from [A-Z] to [A-Za-z] allowing lowercase. These are reasonable enhancements but deviate from the SPEC.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: schema.json line 42 vs SPEC.md section 11.3 shows state type enum extension; schema.json line 55 vs SPEC.md shows backStack enum extension; schema.json patterns use [A-Za-z] vs SPEC's [A-Z]

summary: Feature write-ui-md-linter passes review. The linter correctly validates Markdown structure (10 required sections), screen/state/role ID uniqueness, JSON appendix against schema, and referential integrity. Error output includes file path, line number, error type, and fix suggestion. All three sample files pass linting. README.md provides complete documentation. Minor deviations from SPEC.md (expanded enums, case-insensitive IDs) represent reasonable enhancements.
